assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope which is correct, but doesn't mention the 30-day maximum limit or that this blocks patches too. The BFCM exclusion spans 18 days which is within limits, but the constraint isn't acknowledged.

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Correctly uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope for the June code freeze exclusion, spanning the entire month of June.

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Does not use 'no_minor' or 'no_minor_or_node' scopes for permanent minor version control. Instead uses 'auto_upgrade = false' and release channels, which is a different approach but doesn't address the maintenance exclusion scopes specifically requested.

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the difference with 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusions that can last up to end-of-support.

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags set to 'ALL_UPGRADES' for the exclusions.

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions limit or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period.

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions, only that auto-upgrades respect them.

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it mentions monitoring for security patches.
